Copywriting Blueprint - Week 1 - Call 2
Use nostalgia with the buyer …
Nostalgia formula
Remember when _________ happened?
Use validation of accomplishments or things done
Fk score … nothing over 5th grade for cold traffic
Perrymarshall.com/grade
Really short sentences are the best … the shortest way to say something is the best
· Heat maps – people go to short sentences and not the long ones
· Speed readers read the first and last sentence
· VSls use short sentences on the screen and not longs ones
· 15 words to a sentence – the thoughts get broken up that way
Success formula
Anyone who can _______ enough can ________ (word phrase to use)
Persuasion quadrant
1. 	Wants – I want something
2. 	Needs – I need something
3. 	Fears – I fear something
4. 	Actions – Go do this
Wants – The first level of the thought - What are the items most of the market is already
talking about
· What or who needs to be impressed or attacked?
· What or who needs to be cut off or stopped quickly?
· What or who needs to be gained or started quickly?
· What is the quick beneficial gain of the product or service?
Needs – Think Maslow – these are deep seated needs – These are the secrets that a Priest,
confidant or best friend may hear when the buyer is at their lowest.
Make a quick list of how the buyer would answer these ideas:
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 9 --

· Self actualization – What are the actions to be fulfilled to make the buyer feel special, wanted
or loved by a person or group? What is missing to make the buyer feel confident or on top of the
world?
· Esteem love and belonging – Where does this love come from and who gives it, what
recognition is not being met – what is a big trophy or reward for the buyer?
· Safety or a stable environment – What may cause danger or who may cause danger (fired,
fight, killed, kicked out – danger)
· Physiological needs – Home, shelter and food – Who or what could take away the basics
needs of the buyer?
Fears – Who or what is the prospect scared of
· How could they lose love?
· How could they lose their job and shelter
· How could they lose respect
· What would cause embarrassment or social shame
Actions – What action is needed to move forward
· Is it a click
· Is it a phone call
· Is it a physical action
· Is it something that needs to be avoided?
(want vs need)
What is the real need (important)
What is the real want (urgency)
Want – I want a hot dog
Need – I need nourishment
Want – I want to go to Hawaii
Need - I need time alone with you (quality time) more persuasive
Want - I want to lose weight
Need - I need to survive
Want – I want to have sex
Need - I need emotional interaction
Want – I want to watch the Oroville tonight
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 9 --

Need – I need downtime
Want – I want a smart phone
Need – I need to stay connected to those I love and who love me
Wants are top of mind / needs are below the surface
First thing on the top of their mind – most of the time when they think of the topic:
What are the words they would use when they first wake up and think about it (survey
people – What is the first thing you think about when it comes to __________):
· Money
· Love
· Work
· Appearance / social
What are some things the buyer may say that they want or that the market is saying?
What are the real needs of the buyer beyond their wants (what isn’t being talked about but needs
to be said)?
How to create wants (questions) They all have to be congruent
1. 	Would you like to ________
2. 	Wouldn’t it be fun to ________
3. 	You are probably wanting to __________
If all three fit you have a need if you don’t have a all three you have a want
Salesmen:
You want to protect your family so you need to learn how to sell
· You want to make more money
· You want to be more successful
· You want respect
· You need security for your family
Heart attacks:
I want to have a great check up / I need to be healthy
· Rest easier at night
· Climb stairs without panting or losing breath
· Breeze through your next check up
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 9 --

These statements can be turned into a question or a fear question
Wants need to be used (top of mind stuff) never the most important in persuasion… its easy to
get attention with. A long term client needs emotions and deep level needs with empathy
If you are anything like me (empathy) you want to protect the life of your children and
your family and you care about their future (need)… that is why it is so important to take
care of you heart (need)
This is often the last thing someone thinks about it is too late
I need to make more money as a copywriter (want)
I wish I would have left a legacy (Need)
What does my prospect dread the most when it comes to _________?
What is the least likely thing they would say on their deathbed?
Death bed statements:
1. I wish I would have spent more time with ________
2. I wish I didn’t worry as much
3. I wish I would have had more fun
I need to have fun, its part of the human spirit – lest go to Hawaii
A need is the inverse of a dread
I dead the thought of a heart attack
(need vs want)
Wouldn’t you like piece of mind when it comes to your health (its top of mind) (want)
People want to rest easier…
The need – that’s why you need the latest blood test so you can find out if you have the heart
killer gene
I dread the thought of my partner leaving me
Want to spice up your love life? (want)
Extra credit
You need to learn the signals your wife is giving you (need) (command)
Signals she is about to leave (fear) (she wants to leave) ( man needs to learn)
Signals that she is secretly unhappy (fear)(she has a need) (man needs to learn)
I want to lose weight
I need to live to see my kids grow up
I want to watch the Orrville tonight
I need downtime
I want to earn more money
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 9 --

I need to feel safe, secure, I need to be relevant I need to be loved
Epic life formula
1. 	Relevance – everyone wants to be relevant to someone or a group
2. 	Abundance
3. 	Love
Fears drive 75% of motivation
Surface fears are top of mind
Deep fears are needed to get the buyer to pay attention (this could be emotional)
Does the thought of heart attack scare you to death… what is even more scary is what happens to
your children when they are left to fend for themselves .. If you are anything like me …
Failing formula:
Are you afraid of failing as a copywriter
Are you afraid you cant pay rent…
Are you afraid of __________ Even scarier that that is __________, maybe you feel the same. If
you are anything like me _________ you probably feel the same way…
Duality builder (push pull)
Anything you want you pull towards
Anything you don’t want you push away
What do you want to have happen _________ (pull) what do you not want to have happen
_________ (push)
Moving towards – What action do they need to take
Moving away from – What do they not want to have happen
Want to spice up your love life (pull)
Are you worried that your partner is secretly bored (push) or even considering cheating (push)
Are you maybe even worried your partner is secretly thinking of cheating (push)
Use questions to pull people in
Surface fears:
I cant lose weight no matter how hard I try (statement)
These can be used to overcome objections as well
What is the real fear:
· I cant be loved
· Its not easy to fix
· I am undesirable – my partner may leave me
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 9 --

· The way I pant going upstairs may lead to my death (hear attack)
· I will never find a partner because of the way I look
Surface fear formula:
If you feel like you cant lose weight no matter how hard you try. I understand and some folks
reading this some folks fear they may lose their partner or having a heart attack…
Do you feel like _________ (frustration) about __________ (topic) no matter how hard you try?
I understand and some _________ (group of people) have ___________ (feat for the problem)
and even _________ (fear about the problem)
Surface fear:
· I don’t know if I can pay the rent
Deep fear:
· I don’t know if I am worthy of wealth
· Money is the root of all evil
· Rich people are dicks
(this is going through the mind of the prospect, address it in the copy)
Fears can be tapped by asking questions with a predetermined outcomes..
Predetermined outcome formula
Example: Ever worry that those occasional pounds or occasional indigestion may in fact be a
deadly heart attack waiting to happen?
Ever worry that __________ (action / event) or _________ (action / event) is really a _________
(negative event) waiting to happen?
This takes them to an outcomes that is presupposed
Example
Do you know for certain your wife is happy? Did you know that 73% of women surveyed they
never told their partners they were unsatisfied sexually?
Get people to say I didn’t know that
Would you like to find a solution to help you be a better lover in 10 minutes or less?
Would you like to discover a method to make you an even better lover
Example:
Did you know that your gums are a hiding place for heart damaging bacteria? And that dental
hygiene is directly connected to heart disease?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 9 --

Action
Anything that demands motions towards
More than one (nested)
Easiest block to master
Example:
· Drop what you are doing and go to this page right now, While ______ is fresh on your mind
· I want you to promise yourself something right now… You will never settle for less when it
comes to making money online… do it right now and keep reading
NLP
· Pay attention for the next few minutes
· Imagine for a moment __________
· Remember _________
· Don’t forget = forgetting
Example:
Did you know that your gums are a hiding place for heart damaging bacteria? And that dental
hygiene is directly connected to heart disease?
Now that I have your attention. I would like to remind you about your next appointment. You’re
overdue for your next cleaning.
I can relate – Life gets in that way of what we need to do
Just remember. You upcoming cleaning means a more brighter smile. It can also mean less
harmful bacteria, as well as fresh breath for those crucial first impressions.
Click the link below now to book your next appointment while it is fresh in your mind:
Break down:
Did you know that your gums are a hiding place for heart damaging bacteria? And that dental
hygiene is directly connected to heart disease? (Duality fear and need)
Now that I have your attention (command). I would like to remind you about your next
appointment. You’re overdue for your next cleaning.
I can relate – Life gets in that way of what we need to do (empathy)
Just remember. (command) You upcoming cleaning means a more brighter smile (want). It can
also mean less harmful bacteria (fear) , as well as fresh breath for those crucial first impressions
(want / need) .
Click the link below now to book your next appointment while it is fresh in your mind: (action)
See you next week (pre supposition)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 9 --

Word Alchemy
Need vs demand, deserve, insist
Fear – mortified, nearly died, panicked
Read the sales letter and look for alchemy, quadrants and empathy (plus nlp)
Want – desire , crave, long for
Need – Demand, deserve, insist upon
Fear – Horrified, early died, panic
All formulas
Nostalgia formula
Remember when _________ happened?
Success formula
Anyone who can _______ enough can ________ (word phrase to use)
Failure formula
Are you afraid of __________ Even scarier that that is __________, maybe you feel the same. If
you are anything like me _________ you probably feel the same way…
Duality formula
What do you want to have happen _________ (pull) what do you not want to have happen
_________ (push)
Surface fear formula
Do you feel like _________ (frustration) about __________ (topic) no matter how hard you try?
I understand and some _________ (group of people) have ___________ (feat for the problem)
and even _________ (fear about the problem)
Pre determined outcome formula (presupposition)
Ever worry that __________ (action / event) or _________ (action / event) is really a _________
(negative event) waiting to happen?
Action statements:
· Drop what you are doing and go to this page right now, While ______ is fresh on your mind
· I want you to promise yourself something right now… You will never settle for less when it
comes to making money online… do _________ (action) right now and keep reading
NLP Statements
· Pay attention for the next few minutes
· Imagine for a moment __________
· Remember _________
· Don’t forget = forgetting
